name: crocodiles_processing_workflow
description: Workflow for processing crocodiles by adding a timestamp, assigning an ID, and sending a notification.

transitions.name: process_crocodiles_transition
transitions.description: Transition that processes the crocodile entity
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has been processed (timestamp added, ID assigned, notification sent)

externalized_processors.name: process_add_timestamp
externalized_processors.description: Adds a processed timestamp to the entity

externalized_processors.name: process_assign_id
externalized_processors.description: Assigns a unique ID to the entity if not present

externalized_processors.name: process_send_notification
externalized_processors.description: Sends an asynchronous notification for the processed entity
